name: PDP Accordion Item
description: A single collapsible panel within a PDP Accordion. Reads its content from a product attribute.

attribute_definitions.name: Label
attribute_definitions.description: The heading shown in the collapsed state.

attribute_definitions.name: Product Attribute
attribute_definitions.description: Dot-notation path to the product attribute. Use 'longDescription', 'shortDescription', or 'custom.{attributeName}' for custom attributes.

attribute_definitions.name: Open by default
attribute_definitions.description: When enabled, this panel starts expanded.
